description: Replace the gestionnaire top navigation bar with a collapsible left sidebar, keeping a slim topbar for page title + notifications. Mobile uses a Sheet drawer from left.

userStories.title: Create GestionnaireSidebar component (expanded mode)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a left sidebar showing my navigation items with icons and labels, so I can navigate between sections without using the top bar. Build the sidebar using shadcn SidebarProvider + Sidebar primitives. Include: logo/brand header, main nav items (Dashboard, Patrimoine, Contacts, Contrats, Interventions), secondary items (Parametres, Aides), and user profile footer with avatar/name/role/logout.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar renders with all 7 nav items (5 main + 2 secondary) using correct Lucide icons
Active page is highlighted with primary color background and left accent indicator
User profile section at bottom shows avatar, name, role label, and logout action
Logo 'Seido / Gestion Immobiliere' at top links to dashboard
Sidebar uses shadcn SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton primitives
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Created components/gestionnaire-sidebar.tsx using shadcn Sidebar primitives with collapsible='icon'. 5 main nav items + 2 secondary items. Logo uses Picto_Seido_Color.png. Active state with primary bg + left border accent. User profile dropdown in footer.

userStories.title: Implement sidebar collapsed mode with tooltips
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to collapse the sidebar to icons-only mode so I get more screen space for content. When collapsed, hovering an icon shows a tooltip with the item label. A toggle button (chevron) switches between expanded/collapsed. State persists in cookie.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle button (ChevronLeft/ChevronRight) collapses/expands sidebar
Collapsed mode shows only icons (no labels), sidebar width ~48px
Expanded mode shows icons + labels, sidebar width ~240px
Tooltips appear on hover in collapsed mode showing item labels
State persists via cookie across page reloads and sessions
Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+B toggles sidebar
Smooth CSS transition (200-300ms) between states
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Handled by shadcn SidebarProvider: cookie persistence (sidebar_state), Ctrl+B keyboard shortcut, 200ms transitions. Toggle button with ChevronLeft/Right in sidebar. SidebarMenuButton tooltip prop shows labels on hover in collapsed mode.

userStories.title: Create GestionnaireTopbar component
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a slim top bar that shows the current page title, optional page-level actions, and the notification bell, so I always know where I am and can access notifications quickly. The topbar replaces the current DashboardHeader for gestionnaire (with-navbar) pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Top bar displays current page title based on pathname
Notification bell with unread count badge positioned on right side
Top bar is sticky at top of content area
On mobile (<768px), shows hamburger button on left to open sidebar Sheet
Height matches design (~64px desktop, ~56px mobile)
Team selector appears in topbar for multi-team users
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Created components/gestionnaire-topbar.tsx. Slim topbar with page title (pathname-based mapping), notification bell with popover, team selector for multi-team users, and mobile hamburger button using useSidebar().toggleSidebar().

userStories.title: Integrate sidebar + topbar in (with-navbar) layout
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the sidebar and topbar to be the default navigation on all list/dashboard pages, replacing the current DashboardHeader. Modify the (with-navbar)/layout.tsx to use the new components wrapped in SidebarProvider.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout uses SidebarProvider wrapping GestionnaireSidebar + GestionnaireTopbar + main content
Content area adapts width based on sidebar state (expanded/collapsed)
Existing DashboardHeader is NOT rendered for gestionnaire (with-navbar) pages
DashboardHeader still works for admin role (no regression)
All notification hooks (useGlobalNotifications, useNotificationPopover) work in new topbar
No-navbar pages (detail/edit) are unaffected
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Modified (with-navbar)/layout.tsx: replaced DashboardHeader with SidebarProvider + GestionnaireSidebar + GestionnaireTopbar. Reads sidebar_state cookie server-side for defaultOpen to prevent layout flash. DashboardHeader untouched for admin role.

userStories.title: Mobile responsive sidebar (Sheet drawer < 768px)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire on mobile, I want the sidebar to appear as a slide-in drawer from the left when I tap the hamburger menu, so I can navigate without the sidebar taking permanent space. The drawer auto-closes when I navigate.
acceptanceCriteria: On screens < 768px, sidebar is hidden (no persistent sidebar)
Hamburger button in topbar opens Sheet from left side
Sheet contains full sidebar content (logo, nav items, user profile)
Sheet auto-closes on route change (pathname change)
Sheet auto-closes on nav item click
Touch targets are minimum 48px
Backdrop overlay dismisses sheet on tap
Body scroll is locked when sheet is open
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Handled by shadcn Sidebar primitive: isMobile auto-detects <768px, renders Sheet instead of fixed sidebar. Hamburger in topbar calls toggleSidebar() which triggers setOpenMobile(). useEffect on pathname closes mobile sheet on route change. handleNavClick closes on item click. SidebarMenuButton size='lg' gives 48px+ touch targets.

userStories.title: Tablet responsive behavior (768-1023px auto-collapse)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire on a tablet (768-1023px), I want the sidebar to default to collapsed mode (icons only) to maximize content space, while still being expandable when needed.
acceptanceCriteria: On screens 768-1023px, sidebar defaults to collapsed (icons only)
User can expand sidebar, but it auto-collapses on navigation
On screens >= 1024px, sidebar follows cookie-persisted state
Transition between breakpoints is smooth (no flash/jump)
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Added useEffect with resize listener in GestionnaireSidebar: auto-collapses when width 768-1023px. Only runs on mount (not re-triggered by open state). Desktop (>=1024px) follows cookie-persisted state.

userStories.title: Visual polish: CSS variables, transitions, active states
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the sidebar to look polished with proper colors, spacing, hover effects, and smooth animations matching the reference design images.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS variables for sidebar dimensions in globals.css
Active item has primary bg + left border accent matching reference images
Hover states on nav items (subtle background change)
Smooth expand/collapse animation (200-300ms ease-in-out)
Proper spacing between main nav, secondary nav, and user profile sections
Separator lines between sections match reference design
No layout shift on initial page load (cookie-based initial state)
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: CSS vars already in globals.css (--sidebar, --sidebar-foreground, etc. for light+dark). Active items: bg-primary/10 + text-primary + border-l-[3px] border-l-primary. Hover: hover:bg-sidebar-accent (from shadcn). 200ms transitions from sidebar.tsx primitives. Cookie read server-side for defaultOpen.

userStories.title: Multi-team selector integration in sidebar
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire with multiple teams, I want the team selector to be accessible from the sidebar (expanded mode) or topbar (collapsed/mobile), so I can switch teams easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Team selector in sidebar header when expanded and user has multiple teams
Team selector in topbar when sidebar is collapsed
Team selector in mobile Sheet drawer
Team change triggers router.refresh() as current behavior
Single-team users see no selector (same as current)
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: TeamSelectorCompact in sidebar header (visible when expanded + hasMultipleTeams). TeamSelector in topbar (visible when collapsed via sm:block). Both use useCurrentTeam hook with same state. Mobile Sheet inherits sidebar content including team selector.
